body.probe: memory_search returns a synthesized EXPERIENTIAL node not hand-seeded, after running daemon on existing EPISODIC cluster
body.title: DISTILLATION daemon — cluster EPISODICs, synthesize EXPERIENTIAL
body.result: Distillation daemon shipped in main.py commit a0b6ce4: _run_distillation_background() + cognition/distillation.py + 13 tests.
body.description: Build DISTILLATION daemon: runs periodically, clusters EPISODIC nodes by embedding similarity (threshold TBD), generates candidate EXPERIENTIAL synthesis, self-evaluates generality vs existing graph, inserts if novel. Second pass: EXPERIENTIAL with activation > threshold graduates to PROCEDURAL proposal. Fixes the consolidation gap in the EPISODIC→EXPERIENTIAL→PROCEDURAL lifecycle. Igor's argument: this fixes the metabolism — deposit works, consolidation doesn't. BG-compatible, daemon-level, no think-phase hookpoint needed.
